case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. GEORGE RICHARD ROYLSTON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66773012) AS TO DEFENDANT ROYLSTON, GEORGE RICHARD (SBN 101918) NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYLSTON, GEORGE RICHARD (SBN 101918) $1,998.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,999.64 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,042.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYLSTON, GEORGE RICHARD (SBN 101918) $1,773.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,998.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
